text:
The Indian industrialist revealed that he plans to gift the newly launched MG Windsor car to every Indian athlete who wins a medal at the ongoing Paris Olympics 2024.  India has clinched 3 bronze medals in the Summer Olympics so far.

title: Paris Olympics: JSW MD Sajjan Jindal promises an MG Windsor car to every Indian Olympic medallist - The Economic Times
description: The Indian industrialist revealed that he plans to gift the newly launched MG Windsor car to every Indian athlete who wins a medal at the ongoing Paris Olympics 2024.  India has clinched 3 bronze medals in the Summer Olympics so far.
